summary: The user is seeking recommendations for sci-fi novels and writing resources after completing their first short story, "The Quantum Prophecy." They are also working on a new romance story titled "Love in the Time of Lockdown" and are looking for tips on writing emotional conversations and switching between genres.
facts: The user wrote their first short story, "The Quantum Prophecy," during a weekend getaway. The user is currently working on a new short story titled "Love in the Time of Lockdown." The user plans to focus on making the conversation in "Love in the Time of Lockdown" more personal and intimate.
